================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 5F B1 6E F5 F7
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 124

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x1A
PayloadLen   : 124

[EPS P60 ACU GET TABLE HK]

[Inputs]
c_in[0..5]: 10 19 16 20 16 20
v_in[0..5]: 263 276 262 289 331 305

[Bus/Temp]
vbat: 16129
vcc : 3275
temp[0..2]: 232 232 234

[MPPT]
mppt_mode: 1
vboost[0..5]: 17930 17983 17876 17983 17768 17983
power[0..5]: 2 5 4 5 5 6

[DAC]
dac_en[0..2]: 1 1 1
dac_val[0..5]: 669 671 667 669 659 669

[Boot/Time]
bootcause : 0
bootcnt   : 256
uptime    : 145
resetcause: 0x5285

[MPPT Timing]
mppt_time  : 5
mppt_period: 1

[Device]
device_type[0..7]: 22 0 49 0 0 0 7 1
device_status[0..7]: 1 3 3 3 4 0 1 1

[WDT]
wdt_cnt_gnd : 65793
wdt_gnd_left: 6
